title: Who Killed Kaworu Automatic vs Manual DSS Deicide
display_title: Who Killed Kaworu Automatic vs Manual DSS Deicide
wikitext:
[]: Who Killed Kaworu? Automatic vs Manual DSS Deicide             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Oct 21, 2013 12:26 pm [Split from "How is Shinji responsible for 3rd Impact?" . The below quote represents the true first post of the tangent, which was left in the original topic as a header. - Monk] Sailor Star Dust wrote: About the remote for the DSS Choker, the film near the end heavily implied that it was Gendo's doing because he killed the first/last Angel (Kaworu). So Misato and the Choker aren't a factor in this case, no? And of course, it was Kaworu himself who stopped Fourth Impact, that's probably part of the reason why Misato was so distressed at the end . She was afraid that it was Shinji who died, since it appeared that only Mari and Nerv (Gendo, Fuyutsuki, 3.0 Rei) knew Kaworu was in Evangelion 13 alongside Shinji. At least, that was my understanding of those 2 scenes.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 12:33 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: About the remote for the DSS Choker, the film near the end heavily implied that it was Gendo's doing because he killed the first/last Angel (Kaworu). So Misato and the Choker aren't a factor in this case, no?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 21, 2013 12:49 pm monitoradiation wrote: I'm not sure about it being "heavily implied".

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 1:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: https://github.com/eva3/Evangelion--3.0-Translation/blob/master/TRANSLATION

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Mon Oct 21, 2013 1:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: About the remote for the DSS Choker, the film near the end heavily implied that it was Gendo's doing because he killed the first/last Angel (Kaworu). So Misato and the Choker aren't a factor in this case, no? And of course, it was Kaworu himself who stopped Fourth Impact, that's probably part of the reason why Misato was so distressed at the end . She was afraid that it was Shinji who died, since it appeared that only Mari and Nerv (Gendo, Fuyutsuki, 3.0 Rei) knew Kaworu was in Evangelion 13 alongside Shinji. At least, that was my understanding of those 2 scenes.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 21, 2013 6:37 pm monitoradiation wrote: I still don't see that as it's heavily implied that they actively detonated the DSS choker. For Seele's plan to go through, Kaworu cannot die. Eva-13 will ascend and 4I will commence properly.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Mon Oct 21, 2013 11:16 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The thing is, was Kaworu's dying due to Gendo's meddling because Gendo had a remote for the choker? Assuming Gendo didn't have a remote and Misato clearly didn't press hers, didn't the choker activate on its own ? Kaworu also mentioned how the choker was specifically made for him, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 3:58 am Although, it is worth mentioning that Wille knows about Kaworu since he's the one the DSS was made for.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 4:20 am Gendo didn't directly detonated the DSS Choker because there wasn't any need for him to detonate it : once the spears were pulled, nothing could had stopped the subsequent chain of event that led to the 12th Angel absorbing Llith's remain, and then being absorbed by EVA-13, which will trigger its awakening and with it the detonation of the DSS Choker, because having an automatic activation if the wearer awakes an Eva and the Choker can't be detonated manually is pure and simple logic. The only thing Gendo needed is that EVA-13 pulled out the spears, and all of what happened to Shinji during his stay in neo-NERV was turned into putting him in a mental state where he will pull out the spears out of desperation for being forgiven, no matter what happens : Toji's shirt "coincidentally" arriving in Shinji's room(and it's implied it's the first shirt with a tag on it he received, he would had noticed it if the previous ones had tags too), seeing what happened to Tokyo-3 and the rest of the world and being told that it was his fault, the revelations the very day after about Rei being a clone of Yui, that he didn't saved her but is now trapped inside EVA-01 alongside Yui, all of this was to completely break him so when Kaworu would come with a plan to fix everything be forgiven, an unhoped ray of hope in this nightmare, he will cling to it and not give it up no matter what by fear of letting escape his last hope for being forgiven. And even Kaworu stupidly raised the stakes when explaining the plan to Shinji : 01:02:34 {Kaworu} Ikari Shinji-kun, your only hope lies with the two Spears left at the Impact epicenter in Dogma. 01:02:41 {Kaworu} They are the keys to invoking the Instrumentality Project.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 4:29 am I mean the original plan was to essentially terraform the whole planet, like 2I and 3I each gradually terraformed the planet into Lovecraftland, so logically once the spears were pulled, the 12th Angel would had been absorbed by EVA-13, which would had awakened and used the power of the two spears to repair the world... but that would had also activated the DSS Choker!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 4:37 am Going back to WILLE, maybe they didn't mentioned Kaworu simply because they didn't have enough time or didn't thought it was important(after all they didn't thought that neo-NERV would be interested in Shinji). But the fact that Mari immediately connected the dots when the DSS Choker detected a 13th Angel, and that after Kaworu's death she knew that Shinj was still alive(i.e. not the one wearing the Choker) clearly means that she knows about Kaworu, and if her VA interview is to be trusted, Mari doesn't have an hidden agenda or hide things, so if she knows about Kaworu, then WILLE knows too. Asuka probably didn't mentioned him because she was too hardcore pissed at Shinji to think of everything else, and the telling detail that Shinji is not the one wearing the Choker(it detecting a 13th Angel, meaning that someone else is also piloting with Shinji and wearing the Choker) happened when the 12th mutated and encompassed EVA-13, cutting all communications between them(they could only speak through loudspeakers) and they were more pressing matters at hands, like trying to stop EVA-13 awakening. But I'm still sure that Kaworu knew far more than he said to Shinji and may have not been completely honest with him, I mean even with the spears changed to two LoL, according to Fuyutsuki nearly everything went as SEELE had intended, so that mean that even the original plan with the two different spears was according with SEELE's scenario? That could explain why Asuka was so hell-bent on stopping Shinji, she and WILLE knew that absolutely nothing good can come out of those spears, and even if they can repair the world, it could come at a very heavy price(HIP?)

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 4:47 am [quote and if her VA interview is to be trusted,[/quote] You mean like the ones who'd been lying about the 3.33 dub? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 4:50 am Lying? What do you mean?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 22, 2013 4:56 am I'll play Devil's Advocate here. Why does Q place emphasis on Misato activating the DSS Choker's remote for her use only is the Choker itslef is automated? Seems that she wouldn't need a remote if the Choker would take care of itself. On that same token, why would the film focus on Misato's power with the remote of ultimate someone else (Gendo?) was going to "pull the trigger" instead?

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 5:04 am ElMariachi wrote: Lying? What do you mean?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 5:10 am ^ I was talking about the original Voice Actress, Maaya Sakamoto, she was interviewed alongside others VAs after 3.0 was released. You can find the interview here . @ Freaky : Well, the Choker only detonate automatically if it detects an Awakening, the manual detonation is for every other cases that could arise : if suddenly Shinji starts throwing AT Fields, floating and commanding at a distance an Eva, or if he suddenly spurts Zeruel's tentacles and starts to slaughter everyone, or if he simply tries to escape?(which he did!) If it become clear that Shinji is a threat for mankind, or maybe not even Shinji but some angelic abomination with his appearance, the best is to be able to kill him before he gets into an Eva and start an Impact, especially if he's being brought to SEELE's and they developed a counter-measure for the Choker.(which they did with the dual entry plug system!)

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Oct 22, 2013 5:18 am I was talking about the original Voice Actress, Maaya Sakamoto, she was interviewed after 3.0 was released. You can find the interview here.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 6:22 am According to the interview, that's how Anno described Mari to her, so we can't rule out the possibility that he changes his mind during FINAL's production, nor that he simply lied to Maaya to serve his purpose. After all in another interview Kaworu's VA hinted that Anno had planned the timeskip since the very beginning, but only revealed it to a select few, Kaworu's VA being one of them so he could convey a feeling of foreboding to his few lines in 1.0 and 2.0. Remember one important thing : except Mari, all of the Evangelion characters comes from Anno psyche, including Gendo!

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Oct 22, 2013 7:34 am ^IIRC there was a convincing argument a while back about Mari being based on Anno's wife, and a representation of one of the few upbeat less-flawed people in the world. Going back to the topic, if the detonation was manual, I'm pretty sure that Misato or Ritsuko would have mentioned it later, but they didn't. Nor did either of them mention it to Asuka or Mari, as neither is particularly surprised that Shinji is still alive (I'm assuming here that they had no idea that Kaworu was wearing the collar). So I'm guessing it was automatic.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Oct 22, 2013 7:56 am Shinoyami65 wrote: (I'm assuming here that they had no idea that Kaworu was wearing the collar)
